message:
feat(render): no-flicker proof sketch with 23 counterexample tests

Formal proof sketch documenting 6 theorems for the render pipeline's
no-flicker guarantees: sync bracket completeness, diff completeness,
dirty tracking soundness, diff-dirty equivalence, resize safety, and
end-to-end pipeline composition.

23 adversarial tests attempt to surface counterexamples through property
testing (proptest), edge cases (single-cell, block alignment boundaries),
stress tests (full-screen rewrites, flash patterns, resize oscillation),
and style/attribute-only change detection.

All tests include JSONL structured logging and golden checksum
verification for deterministic replay.

Closes bd-1rz0.20.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
